predictedBugs: processStdin and processStdout might be undefined in test environments - readline.createInterface could hang on non-TTY stdin
execSync in resolveBinary() on missing node_modules/.bin/ binary may throw ENOENT before `which` fallback can run
path.join(featureDir, 'requirements.md') is always truthy (a string) so the `if (!reqPath)` guard never triggers
edgeCases: Empty project with no node_modules/ at all - all tools will be missing, pre-flight should handle gracefully
Windows platform where `which` command doesn't exist - getWhichCommand returns `where` on win32
npm install --save-dev failing due to network issues or lockfile - installAllMissing catches each failure individually
